name: Blaster the Rocket Man
description: '''Blaster the Rocket Man''' was a [[Christian punk|Christian]] [[horror punk]] band from Indianapolis, Indiana. It formed in the early 1990s as '''Blaster the Rocketboy''' and signed with [[Boot to Head Records]] in 1994. It released two albums before signing with Jackson Rubio Records. Its name changed to Blaster the Rocket Man for its 1999 release ''[[The Monster Who Ate Jesus]]''. Its final release was ''The Anatomy of a Monster'', a compilation of material from its Boot to Head years plus some bonus material.
